app.nubank.com

ele usa o prod-global e o api/proxy

https://prod-global-webapp-proxy.nubank.com.br/api/proxy/AJxL5LD1_tXTsdl5luooo69vWaMYPjMJww.aHR0cHM6Ly9wcm9kLWdsb2JhbC1hdXRoLm51YmFuay5jb20uYnIvYXBpL2xpZnQ

Esse data/string parece ser o recurso do site. Porém eles usam algum encoder para proteger os arquivos

```http
GET /roubo/_next/data/ZKSS54Bu9NrocNWidSu42/home.json HTTP/2
Host: app.nubank.com.br
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64; rv:126.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/126.0
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5
Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br
Referer: https://app.nubank.com.br/beta/credit-card/my-cards/
Purpose: prefetch
X-Nextjs-Data: 1
Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty
Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors
Sec-Fetch-Site: same-origin
Priority: u=4
Te: trailers
X-Correlation-Id: bc-handle
```
